languages.text: "Благодарю вас, {name}. С вашего позволения, я оставлю вас. Мне нужно многое обдумать".
"Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю вас, {name}. С вашего позволения, я оставлю вас. Мне нужно многое обдумать".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."
"Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."
"Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."

languages.text: «Gracias, {name}. Con permiso, le dejo por ahora. Tengo muchas cosas en las que pensar».
languages.original_text: "Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias, {name}. Con permiso, le dejo por ahora. Tengo muchas cosas en las que pensar».

languages.text: “谢谢您，大人。如果可以的话，我就告退了。有很多事等着我去想清楚。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."

traits.locale_text: “谢谢您，大人。如果可以的话，我就告退了。有很多事等着我去想清楚。”

languages.text: « Merci, {name}. Avec votre permission, je vais maintenant prendre congé. Je dois réfléchir sérieusement à tout cela. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."

traits.locale_text: « Merci, {name}. Avec votre permission, je vais maintenant prendre congé. Je dois réfléchir sérieusement à tout cela. »

languages.text: "Teşekkür ederim. İzninizle şimdi sizi yalnız bırakayım. Düşünecek çok şeyim var."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."

traits.locale_text: "Teşekkür ederim. İzninizle şimdi sizi yalnız bırakayım. Düşünecek çok şeyim var."

languages.text: "Danke, {name}. Wenn Ihr gestattet, werde ich jetzt gehen. Ich muss über Vieles Nachdenken."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."

traits.locale_text: "Danke, {name}. Wenn Ihr gestattet, werde ich jetzt gehen. Ich muss über Vieles Nachdenken."

languages.text: 「ありがとう、{name} 。よろしければ、これで失礼します。考えることがたくさんあるので」。
languages.original_text: "Thank you, {name}. If I may, I will leave you now. I have much to think about."
